report.summary: Community growth cycle v18 (Mar 16): Aztec Network guide (privacy zkRollup, Noir v1.0, AZTEC TGE, Ignition Chain) launched as new narrative drop; Saturday Aztec 6-post thread + single tweet + Discord announcement drafted; Thursday newsletter amended to include Aztec guide and updated Degen Corner with privacy-wars thesis; Sunday privacy landscape comparison tweet and Monday Noir developer spotlight drafted; social-aztec-network-guide.svg created with dual-state architecture diagram and competitor comparison panel.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Saturday Mar 21, 6 posts): Aztec Network privacy launch — hook on 'every Ethereum tx is public'; PXE dual state model; Ignition Chain live stats (3,500+ sequencers, 50+ provers); what makes Aztec different from Tornado Cash / Zcash / Monero; Noir language v1.0 developer angle; AZTEC tokenomics (+65% TGE gain, 10.35B supply); CTA to /learn/aztec-network-guide
Tweet (Saturday, punchy): Ethereum always-public problem → Aztec PXE + ZK proofs solution; 4 bullet proof points; CTA to guide
Discord/Telegram (Saturday): Aztec guide drop — dual state model, Noir v1.0, AZTEC token, competitor comparison, risk callouts; direct link
Newsletter amendment (Thursday Mar 19): Insert Aztec guide into NEW ON DEGEN0X section; Degen Corner updated with privacy-wars thesis and 'BTCFi vs ZK privacy infrastructure bet of 2026' framing
Tweet (Sunday Mar 22): Privacy landscape 2026 overview — Aztec (ZK), Zcash (zk-SNARKs), Monero (ring sigs), Zama (FHE), Secret Network (TEEs); 'privacy wars = infrastructure bet of 2026'
Tweet (Monday Mar 23): Noir language developer spotlight — v1.0 stable, Rust-inspired syntax, 200+ packages, backend-agnostic, ZK circuits without a PhD; CTA to guide

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-aztec-network-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark indigo/purple ZK theme; left panel: Aztec Network title with purple-to-cyan gradient, PRIVACY ZKROLLUP badge, 3 stat chips (3500+ Sequencers, 50+ Provers, +65% TGE 24h), Vitalik-backed badge, Noir v1.0 Stable badge, full guide URL; right panel: dual-state architecture diagram — PXE private node (purple glass card) connected via dashed ZK-PROOF SUBMITTED beam to AVM public node (cyan glass card), each with bullet specs; far-right comparison panel: Zcash/Monero/Tornado Cash vs Aztec with green checkmarks; Noir code snippet box at bottom-right; purple-to-violet brand bar; degen0x logo and bottom strip. Saved to /public/social-aztec-network-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Aztec Network is the freshest content on degen0x as of Mar 16 (build v4 today) — immediate amplification maximizes indexing + social signal co-occurrence
Privacy narrative flagged as top 2026 theme by a16z and Grayscale — broad audience potential beyond core crypto-native users
AZTEC token is 7 weeks post-TGE — still in early price discovery, high engagement from token holders seeking fundamental research
Dual-state model (private PXE + public AVM) is visually explainable — architecture diagram in social card is highly shareable on tech Twitter
Noir language angle opens new developer audience (ZK devs, Rust devs) — Monday Mar 23 tweet targets this cohort specifically
326+ pages live, PUBLISH_QUEUE fully drained — Aztec guide queued for next build-and-deploy cycle
v18 posting schedule slots Aztec into Sat/Sun/Mon — zero conflict with v17 Mon-Fri calendar; extends content coverage through next week
